calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Continued To Apr-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Baron Miller for and with Danielle Hendricks.

Mr. Miller stated that the home is the sole asset, that there is $270,000.00 owing on the first deed of trust with Wachovia, that no payment had been made in three and a half years, that he is not aware of any foreclosure proceedings and that they are concerned that there is not enough equity in the home to pay off the debt. In addition, he stated that Ms. Hendricks has an appointment with a Real Estate Agent, that the Agent will give them an informal appraisal, and that he will publish if they are going forward or file a dismissal if they are not going forward. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to April 25, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Feb-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Danielle Hendricks in Propria Persona.

The Court advised Ms. Hendricks that she needs to file a declaration addressing all of the items listed in the Examiner's notes. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to February 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court also advised Ms. Hendricks that she could file an ex parte petition for appointment of a Special Administrator to deal with the loan modification of the property.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.
